resources.string: See exactly what data GwaBoard stores on your device. All processing is 100%% on-device — nothing is sent to any server.
The keyboard learns from your typing to improve suggestions. Only word frequency patterns are stored — never passwords, credit card numbers, or content from sensitive fields.
When disabled, only standard word predictions are shown. The on-device language model is unloaded to free memory.
Language model is currently loaded in memory (~400 MB)
Permanently delete all word patterns learned from your typing. Dictionary suggestions will still work, but personalized predictions will be reset.
This will permanently delete all word patterns learned from your typing. Personalized predictions will be reset. This action cannot be undone.

GwaBoard is designed with privacy as a core principle:

• All AI inference runs 100%% on your device
• The keyboard has zero internet permission
• No SMS, contacts, or personal data is accessed by the keyboard directly
• Word patterns are learned only from non-sensitive input fields
• The companion app (if installed) shares only statistical profiles — never raw messages
• You can delete all learned data at any time from this screen
